node.title: Compatibility of your existing NetGauge OoklaServer Daemon – Ookla Speedtest Custom
node.Stub: To ensure network software was compatible with the latest JavaScript client technology, Ookla's database of licensed vendors needed to update the server-side component hosted in their network. Since it was not always possible to remotely verify each instance due to vendor side networking security limitations, we provided a tutorial to help manually check the version on the server.
node.Subject_Matter: C++, High-performance Browser Networking, SSL Certificates

node.title: Code Breaking Changes - NinjaTrader 8 Help Guide
node.Stub: One of my major assignments as a Product Manager for NinjaTrader was discovering and documenting many of the changes our community of 3rd party developers needed to use to convert their C# NinjaScript types from Version 7 to Version 8.

node.title: Beta Release Notes - NinjaTrader 8 Help Guide
node.Stub: Through the two-year beta release cycle of NinjaTrader 8, I was responsible for compiling and writing release notes that described the changes for each iteration up until the final release candidate.
